data.title: Morgan Stanley’s Ekblom Reaffirms Buy on Breedon, Lifts 12-Month Price Target to 474p on Improved Earnings Outlook and Margin Visibility
data.description:
Morgan Stanley analyst Cedar Ekblom maintained a Buy rating on Breedon today and set a price target of p474.00.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Cedar Ekblom has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors, including Breedon’s Q1 performance and its earnings outlook. Revenue growth in the first quarter was broadly in line with expectations, with solid gains in the U.S. and Ireland helping to balance softer conditions in Great Britain, and Morgan Stanley’s FY26 EBITDA forecast now sits above visible alpha consensus.

In addition, management’s use of commodity hedging and contractual pricing mechanisms underpins margin visibility, even as residential markets stay difficult and growth shifts toward more robust non‑residential segments. Reflecting this improved earnings and risk profile, Ekblom raised the 12‑month price target from 448p to 474p, implying further upside from the current share price and supporting a constructive stance on the stock.
